title: IS428

Welcome! This website is a dedicated platform for IS428 Visual Analytics for Business Intelligence. Our team is…


…



Throughout this semester, we will be updating this site with: * Interactive Dashboards: Visualizing scam frequencies and financial impacts. * Predictive Models: Using time-series analysis to forecast future threats. * Methodology & Documentation: Detailed walkthroughs of our data cleaning and design processes.




Choo Yi Ning – School of Computing and Information Systems (SCIS)
Saanvi Madan – School of Economics (SOE)
